name: tree-sitter-baf
description: WeiDU BAF (Infinity Engine script) grammar for tree-sitter

scripts.generate:types: pnpm exec dts-tree-sitter . > src/tree-sitter.d.ts && cp src/tree-sitter.d.ts ../../server/src/weidu-baf/tree-sitter.d.ts
scripts.format-samples: for f in test/samples/*.baf; do node ../../server/out/format-cli.js "$f" > "test/samples-expected/$(basename "$f")"; done
